problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry may resolve Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? by activating at the systems level.
